onboarding.text2: or click the bars below Yukai:

settings.title: Settings
settings.voice_hint: ElevenLabs — best for English. Fish — natural Russian.
settings.sensitivity_hint: Fill = VAD speech probability. Drag the orange threshold — that's where "speech" starts. Applies instantly.
settings.language_hint: Changes the language Yukai responds in. Voice auto-adjusts.
settings.connection_hint: If the app fails to connect — try the RU mirror. Window reloads on change.
settings.devchat_hint: Tell me what broke, what's missing, what you liked

account.title: Account
account.notSignedIn: Not signed in — Yukai can't respond

empty.hint: Say to Yukai: "let's study English" or "let's practice" — learned words will appear here

bottom.hint: Say "let's practice" — Yukai will show new words in guess mode

music.title: Song history
music.name: Music recognition
music.desc: Shazam-style: hold Left Alt + ` for Yukai to identify what's playing

dictation.title: Dictation history
dictation.name: Dictation
dictation.desc: Hold Right Alt and speak — text is transcribed and pasted into the active field

english.title: English history
english.name: English learning
english.desc: Flashcards with SRS spaced repetition. [img: word] → image + Yukai asks.

screenshot.title: Screenshots + vision
screenshot.name: Screenshot + vision
screenshot.desc: Screen capture → Claude describes what it sees. Say "what's on screen", "select region", "what anime is this".

music.empty: Hold Alt+` to identify the playing song

dictation.title: Dictation
dictation.empty: Hold Right Alt and speak — text gets pasted and saved here

empty.hint: Click "+ full" or say "what's on screen?" / "select region and tell me what it is"

login.title: Welcome back
login.subtitle: Sign in to continue chatting with Yukai

register.title: Let's meet
register.subtitle: Create an account in a minute and start chatting with Yukai
register.errorLoginAfter: Account created but auto-login failed — try the sign in page
